title: Exponential Growth, Decay, and Logarithmic Scales · Worked Case: Logarithm Inverse
summary: Model adoption, cooling, depreciation, and sound-level measurements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int logarithm inverse increment in an exponential and logarithmic scenario lab. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use logarithms as inverses to solve for time, rate, or exponent.
Fit exponential growth and decay parameters with explicit initial conditions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
